name: S'more Topped Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, and egg in a large bowl. Beat until light and fluffy.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix until well blended.
3. Pour batter into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes or until set.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the batter.
6. Top with marshmallows and peanuts.
7. Bake an additional 10 to 15 minutes, or until marshmallows are lightly browned.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
